summary: Frontend-only validation completed for pre-sales UI update on public URL. Pre-sales login lands on pre-sales board, sticky header actions are present, horizontal stage tabs work, kanban/list toggles render, and stage-tab filtering works in list view.
action_items: No blocking issues found in requested frontend scope.
Optional: confirm business intent for showing later pipeline tabs in pre-sales view (Branch Confirmed/Appointment Booked/Completed) even though pre-sales board primarily handles early stages.
critical_code_review_comments: Potential logic mismatch: pre-sales stage tabs render full PIPELINE_STAGES, but pre-sales lead filtering excludes many branch-linked records, which can make later-stage tabs appear empty by design.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Used public URL from frontend/.env. Tested manual login with presales@fitsiomax.com/presales123 and verified: pre-sales-only board visibility, sticky header action buttons, stage-tab row, kanban/list toggles, and stage filtering behavior. Screenshots captured: ui_iteration11_login_load.jpeg and ui_iteration11_presales_board.jpeg.
rca of the issue: No functional defect reproduced in requested scope.
mocked_api_status: No mocked APIs used in this run; tested against live public endpoints.
